title: Ender Dragon Drops
description: Adds Drop From Ender Dragon like Soul Sand, Netherite ingots and rarely Dragon Egg
body:
Ender Dragon Drop

Soul sand : 89%

Netherite Ingot : 10%

Dragon Egg : 1%



Its perfect for Servers Because of adding chance to get more than one dragon egg in one server where commands are disabled



Its good way to get Netherite; 1/10 ender dragons drop Netherite Ingot
